videos.title: The hidden feature you haven’t seen! 😱😱😱
Tracking your ENTIRE LIFE in a notebook
videos.description:
Using a notebook to track your habits, your lifestyle, your finances, your creativity, video output, photo missions, photo locations, thoughts, ideas - everything you could possibly think of. Implementing systems to improve your life, your productivity and make you more creative. This is some of the most intense critical documentation you can possibly record in to a journal.
